query_title: Beneath the Valley of the Ultra-Vixens

recommendations.title: Beyond the Valley of the Dolls
recommendations.overview: An all-girl rock band moves to Hollywood in the hope of achieving success, only to fall into a whirlpool of wickedness and decadence.

recommendations.title: Supervixens
recommendations.overview: Clint must flee after his wife is killed by a psychopathic cop, who tries to pin the murder on him.

recommendations.title: Faster, Pussycat! Kill! Kill!
recommendations.overview: A trio of thrill-seeking go-go dancers kidnap a young girl and attempt to seduce an old rancher and his two sons out of their small fortune, but their scheme doesn't play out as intended.

recommendations.title: Up!
recommendations.overview: Adolf Hitler is hiding out in California under the identity of Adolf Schwartz; however, he is soon murdered by a mysterious assailant. This coincides with the arrival of a mysterious woman in a nearby town. Whatever the case might be, nobody seems in

recommendations.title: Vixen!
recommendations.overview: In a Canadian mountain resort, Vixen Palmer resides with her naive pilot husband Tom. While he's away flying in tourists, she sleeps with practically everybody including a husband and his wife, and even her biker brother. However, the only one she wo

recommendations.title: Your Fault
recommendations.overview: The love between Noah and Nick seems unwavering despite their parents' attempts to separate them. But his job and her entry into college open up their lives to new relationships that will shake the foundations of both their relationship and the Leist

recommendations.title: Almost Cops
recommendations.overview: When an overeager community officer and a reckless ex-detective are forced to team up, plenty of chaos ensues on the streets of Rotterdam.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Runaway Bride
recommendations.overview: A young bride in the midst of her wedding finds herself mysteriously transported to the TARDIS. The Doctor must discover what her connection is with the Empress of the Racnoss's plan to destroy the world.

recommendations.title: Spider-Ham: Caught in a Ham
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Spider-Ham: Caught in a Ham follows Spider-Ham as he faces off against bad guys, chows down on hot dogs, and makes plenty of food-based puns.

recommendations.title: Borat Subsequent Moviefilm: Delivery of Prodigious Bribe to American Regime for Make Benefit Once Glorious Nation of Kazakhstan
recommendations.overview: 14 years after making a film about his journey across the USA, Borat risks life and limb when he returns to the United States with his young daughter, and reveals more about the culture, the COVID-19 pandemic, and the political elections.
